isi.lyrics:
Lyric BAE173 - BAE (Before Anyone Else)

Romanization

Hi elseu, jigeum mwo hae?
ajik an jago inne
geunyang mwo jom simsimhande
jamkkan daehwana hallae?

gunggeumhan geo da mureobwa
gomin isseum geotdo teoreonwa Yeah
eotteon geotdo gwaenchaneun uri sainikka

amudo mollajun ne mami jakku eoduwojil ttaen
geurimjaga doeeo neul ne gyeote kkok buteoisseulge

naegen nuguboda piryohan neonikka
eolmadeun nareul jul su isseo Baby
nan maeilmaeil Be there for you

neon nae sesang gajang jungyohae
Before anyone else
moduga dwidorabwado
nan neul gyeote isseulge
You’re my bae, bae, bae
You’re my bae, bae, bae
eopdeon sarangdo moa
da neoege julge, Baby I’ll be there oh

maeil achim nuneul tteumyeon
gajang meonjeo tteooreuneun neo
nae harureul bakhyeojuneun bit
neol wihae noraehalge My star
sigani heulleodo byeonchi ana neowa na

jinawatdeon sigan sok
itji mothal geugot
naege modeun iyuga dwaejun neoraneun kkot
ireobeoriji anke
deo bitnal su itge
neoman saranghalge Before anyone else
amudo mollajun ne mami jakku eoduwojil ttaen
geurimjaga doeeo neul ne gyeote kkok buteoisseulge

naegen nuguboda piryohan neonikka
eolmadeun nareul jul su isseo Baby
nan maeilmaeil Be there for you

neon nae sesang gajang jungyohae
Before anyone else
moduga dwidorabwado
nan neul gyeote isseulge
You’re my bae, bae, bae
You’re my bae, bae, bae
eopdeon sarangdo moa
da neoege julge, Baby I’ll be there oh

oh darling i’ll never leave you alone my bae
oh darling i have something to say

You’re my bae, bae, bae
You’re my bae, bae, bae
eopdeon sarangdo moa
da neoege julge, Baby I’ll be there oh

Hangeul

Hi 엘스, 지금 뭐 해?
아직 안 자고 있네
그냥 뭐 좀 심심한데
잠깐 대화나 할래?

궁금한 거 다 물어봐
고민 있음 것도 털어놔 Yeah
어떤 것도 괜찮은 우리 사이니까

아무도 몰라준 네 맘이 자꾸 어두워질 땐
그림자가 되어 늘 네 곁에 꼭 붙어있을게

내겐 누구보다 필요한 너니까
얼마든 나를 줄 수 있어 Baby
난 매일매일 Be there for you

넌 내 세상 가장 중요해
Before anyone else
모두가 뒤돌아봐도
난 늘 곁에 있을게
You’re my bae, bae, bae
You’re my bae, bae, bae
없던 사랑도 모아
다 너에게 줄게, Baby I’ll be there oh

매일 아침 눈을 뜨면
가장 먼저 떠오르는 너
내 하루를 밝혀주는 빛
널 위해 노래할게 My star
시간이 흘러도 변치 않아 너와 나

지나왔던 시간 속
잊지 못할 그곳
내게 모든 이유가 돼준 너라는 꽃
잃어버리지 않게
더 빛날 수 있게
너만 사랑할게 Before anyone else

그림자가 되어 늘 네 곁에 꼭 붙어있을게

You’re my bae, bae, bae
You’re my bae, bae, bae
없던 사랑도 모아
다 너에게 줄게, Baby I’ll be there oh

oh darling i’ll never leave you alone my bae
oh darling i have something to say

You’re my bae, bae, bae
You’re my bae, bae, bae
없던 사랑도 모아
다 너에게 줄게, Baby I’ll be there oh

isi.lyrics:
Lyric BAE173 - WHAT

Romanization

You know what we got some special
Guess who’s back We’re go
CLAP CLAP CLAP CLAP
CLAP CLAP CLAP CLAP

bunwigireul milgo danggyeo urin Lever
akkimeopsi geunyang jeulgyeo It's a favor
kkothyeo beoryeo uri Rhythm machi Arrow
Shoot it like a player

jal bwa We don’t give a WHAT
Ay jumbi da dwaesseo
ttakhi deo garil ge mwo isseo
deo nopi kkeulgo ollaga
Like a king from the bottom
sigineun dagawasseo balkampo deureo Let go
michindeusi ttwieodeureo Rush

Now we don’t give a WHAT (Ah-ya-ya)
jeonghaejin seoneul neomeo (Oh-eh-oh-oh)
Cuz we don’t give a WHAT (Ah-ya-ya)
beonjyeoga machi Fire
byeolcheoreom Bling bling like this

No, We can't stop it for ya
kkeutkkaji ganeun geoya
nuga mworageon Gotta go
8 boys appear WHAT (WHAT)?
(Ah-ya-ya)
nae ganeun giri All I want (want)
Now we don’t give a WHAT?

I don’t give a WHAT I don’t give a
sum makhyeodo jaril jikyeo nan
Still we keep on dareun gireun dwaesseo
eoseo pihae dwiro gadeunji hae

Woah sori jilleo bwara an barae
maneun geoseun waenya I got it all
8 Boys appear
bwa i umjigim
neukkim jugyeo It’s a piece of art ya know

mageul su eopseo machi tto hanaui ssaum
byeogeul ttulgo ollaga
We return to the battle
mangseoril sai chyeodeureoganda ginjanghaera Go
michindeusi ttwieodeureo Rush

jeonghaejin seoneul neomeo (Oh-eh-oh-oh)
